findings.title: Hardcoded service API key enables authentication bypass
findings.description: Hardcoded SERVICE_API_KEY and INTERNAL_GATEWAY_TOKEN constants used for authentication bypass

findings.title: MD5 used for password hashing
findings.description: Passwords hashed with MD5 which is cryptographically broken for password storage

findings.title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
findings.description: Login endpoint accepts unlimited authentication attempts without rate limiting or account lockout

findings.title: Hardcoded gateway token accepted as valid authentication
findings.description: Token verification endpoint accepts hardcoded INTERNAL_GATEWAY_TOKEN as valid authentication

findings.title: Password reset token leaked in API response
findings.description: Password reset token returned directly in API response as debug_token instead of being sent via email only
